bibliography:
A escolha da bibliografia depende do tema escolhido e constitui um dos trabalhos a realizar pelo candidato de forma a alicerçar o tema da sua Dissertação.

The choice of literature depends on the chosen theme and is one of the tasks to be completed by the candidate in order to sustain the subject of the dissertation.
objectives: This curricular unit supports the execution of the master's thesis. In the dissertation, the student will deepen a theme and present an academic text according to the experimental and scientific method and defend it before a jury. It will deepen the ability to identify problems, the study of similar problems and relevant approaches published in the literature, the ability to solve non-trivial problems, the ability to evaluate results and draw conclusions, the ability to write in an understandable and accurate way its work and the ability to present and defend it before third parties.
organicUnit: ECATI - School of Communication, Architecture, Arts and Information Technologies
programme: The syllabus is defined in each case depending on the theme chosen by the candidate based on his research and suggestions from the supervisor.
presentation: This curricular unit supports the execution of the master's thesis. Its final result is the elaboration and defense of the dissertation.
avaliacao: A avaliação é feita por um júri que analisa a qualidade da dissertação, da sua apresentação e da sua defesa em provas públicas.
